commands.review_summary:
This PR consolidates fork fixes that harden iMessage outbound allowlists, adjust gateway sandbox/status diagnostics, broaden plugin manifest auth-marker discovery, and make the Convex credential-broker tsconfig strict JSON.

PR surface: Source +570, Tests +1753, Docs 0, Config -6. Total +2317 across 33 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run in this read-only checkout. Source review and the PR's focused tests make the paths plausible, but the iMessage behavior still needs real setup proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed for compatibility/security-boundary risk and contributor proof; there is no narrow automated repair from this read-only review.

target.title: Consolidate fork fixes onto main
target.body:
Consolidates the current fork-only OpenClaw fixes into a single mainline PR from `LDMB123:main`.

Supersedes:
- #88911
- #88912
- #88913
- #88914

This branch was rebuilt on current `upstream/main` (`f8491b0fcf`) and contains the same patch payloads from the four PR branches:
- iMessage outbound allowlist hardening
- gateway sandbox diagnostics
- plugin auth marker manifest handling
- Convex tsconfig JSON cleanup

Local proof run:
- `node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs"); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("qa/convex-credential-broker/convex/tsconfig.json","utf8")); console.log("convex tsconfig valid JSON");'`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/daemon-cli/status.gather.test.ts src/gateway/net.test.ts src/infra/ports-format.test.ts src/agents/model-auth-markers.test.ts src/plugins/manifest-metadata-scan.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/actions.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/channel.runtime.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/deliver.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/targets.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/test-plugin.test.ts src/infra/outbound/deliver.test.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-normalization.test.ts`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed: Consolidates the four fork PR payloads onto the single `LDMB123:main` branch while preserving the local OpenClaw setup as one clean checkout/worktree and fixing the sandbox DNS false-negative classifier route for GitHub API DNS errors.

Real environment tested: Real local OpenClaw setup on `/Users/louisherman/Projects/openclaw`, branch `main`, head `8016c43f43e170bd19448ac7a6440fac857685b4`, with host-side GitHub CLI used only for non-secret branch/status readback.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `git -C /Users/louisherman/Projects/openclaw status --short --branch`
- `git -C /Users/louisherman/Projects/openclaw worktree list --porcelain`
- `gh api repos/LDMB123/openclaw/branches --paginate --jq '.[].name'`
- `openclaw config validate --json`
- `node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs"); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("qa/convex-credential-broker/convex/tsconfig.json","utf8")); console.log("convex tsconfig valid JSON");'`
- `bash /Users/louisherman/.openclaw/scripts/sandbox-proof.sh classify "error connecting to api.github.com"`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/daemon-cli/status.gather.test.ts src/gateway/net.test.ts src/infra/ports-format.test.ts src/agents/model-auth-markers.test.ts src/plugins/manifest-metadata-scan.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/actions.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/channel.runtime.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/deliver.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/targets.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/test-plugin.test.ts src/infra/outbound/deliver.test.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-normalization.test.ts`

Evidence after fix: Terminal output captured after the consolidated branch was pushed:

```text
$ git -C /Users/louisherman/Projects/openclaw status --short --branch
## main...origin/main

$ git -C /Users/louisherman/Projects/openclaw worktree list --porcelain
worktree /Users/louisherman/Projects/openclaw
HEAD 8016c43f43e170bd19448ac7a6440fac857685b4
branch refs/heads/main

$ gh api repos/LDMB123/openclaw/branches --paginate --jq '.[].name'
main

$ openclaw config validate --json
{"valid":true,"path":"/Users/louisherman/.openclaw/openclaw.json"}

$ node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs"); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("qa/convex-credential-broker/convex/tsconfig.json","utf8")); console.log("convex tsconfig valid JSON");'
convex tsconfig valid JSON

$ bash /Users/louisherman/.openclaw/scripts/sandbox-proof.sh classify "error connecting to api.github.com"
id: github-keychain-dns
route: verify-host-side
owner_lane: main Codex or Claude Code lane with host shell approval
privacy: local-only for token/keychain state
default_action: Confirm host auth and network with non-secret commands, then use connector or approved gh/git host commands for the GitHub operation.
matched_signal: error connecting to api.github.com

$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/daemon-cli/status.gather.test.ts src/gateway/net.test.ts src/infra/ports-format.test.ts src/agents/model-auth-markers.test.ts src/plugins/manifest-metadata-scan.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/actions.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/channel.runtime.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/deliver.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/targets.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/test-plugin.test.ts src/infra/outbound/deliver.test.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-normalization.test.ts
[test] passed 7 Vitest shards in 19.80s
```

Observed result after fix: The local OpenClaw checkout is clean on `main`, the fork branch inventory is reduced to `main`, the OpenClaw config validates, the Convex tsconfig parses as JSON, the GitHub DNS sandbox signal routes to `github-keychain-dns`, and the focused OpenClaw test slice passed 7 Vitest shards.

What was not tested: No live merge into upstream `openclaw/openclaw` was performed by this branch author; that remains maintainer-gated after PR checks and review policy pass.
